nasb.text: If we receive the testimony of men, the testimony of God is greater; for the testimony of God is this, that He has testified concerning His Son.

esv.text: If we receive the testimony of men, the testimony of God is greater, for this is the testimony of God that he has borne concerning his Son.

cnv.text: 我們若接受人的見證，　神的見證就更強而有力了，因為這是　神為他的兒子作的見證。

ccb.text: 我们既然接受人的见证，就更该接受上帝的见证，因为上帝为祂的儿子做了见证。

csbs.text: 我们既然接受人的见证，神的见证就更应该接受了，因为这是神的见证，就是神为他的儿子所做的见证。
